## What this changes

Briefly, what and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run demo` and `npm run demo -- resveratrol-sirt1` still pass
- [ ] `node --check` passes on changed `src/*.mjs`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or explained why one is needed)
- [ ] Preserves the invariants in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — grounding is
      deterministic, verify-before-compare, "not reported" never guessed, gaps stay bounded
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if behaviour changed
